headline: IMRX Begins Dosing in Phase III Pancreatic Cancer Study, Stock Up
summary: Immuneering stock rises after dosing the first patient in a pivotal phase III study of atebimetinib plus mGnP for first-line metastatic pancreatic cancer.

headline: REGN (NASDAQ:REGN) Presents a Classic Value Opportunity with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) shows strong value with a P/E of 13.4, solid financial health, and double-digit growth potential, making it a compelling pick for value investors.
